title: How Your Coffee Is a Science Experiment in a Cup

segments.text: Your morning coffee is more than just hot water.
It’s a complex chemical reaction in action.
When hot water meets coffee grounds, flavors explode.
That’s why different brewing methods taste so unique.
Even your choice of water affects the flavor.
All this is happening in your cup every morning.
Follow Curio for your daily dose of science.

description: Your coffee is a brewing science experiment! Follow for daily science & tech! ☕
